backendRole: PVF storage and script access backend behind pvf-agent-core

requiredCapabilities.summary: Open a target PVF with explicit encoding and close the session without leaking write state.
List PVF paths with prefix/contains filters, stable pagination, and total-match metadata.
Find paths by filename or path fragment. This may be implemented through search or paged list fallback.
Read/decompile text and script-like PVF files with explicit read encoding.
List primary .lst registries and, when requested, parse entry counts.
Resolve numeric IDs through an explicit .lst registry and return the registered PVF path.
Build or consume local path and .lst indexes with source freshness checks.
Apply a change set only with timestamped backup, explicit output PVF, and readback verification.

safetyInvariants: Agent-facing MCP must not expose write tools by default.
A write smoke test must write to an explicit output path and must not modify the source PVF.
Every numeric ID used by a test must be resolved through the exact .lst registry named by the fixture.
Local indexes are acceleration artifacts only; stale indexes cannot replace target PVF readback.
